heading: Affirmative action
label: 2219c Affirmative action
text: All institutions of the Farm Credit System with more than 20 employees shall establish and maintain an affirmative action program plan that applies the affirmative action standards otherwise applied to contractors of the Federal Government.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “All” for “The Assistance Board established under and all”.Pub. L. 115–334section 2278a of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “All” for “The Assistance Board established under and all”.Pub. L. 115–334section 2278a of this title
